title: cinnamomum smithianum
intro: Cinnamomum smithianum, also known as East Indian cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cinnamomum smithianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to create teas, topical creams, and other medicinal products.
